headline: Will GE Vernova (GEV) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: GE Vernova (GEV) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Why GE Aerospace Stock Can Keep Flying
summary: GE Aerospace  stock has rebounded nicely from a post-Iran war slump.  On Wednesday, Citi analyst John Godyn raised his GE Aerospace price target by 22% to $431 a share from $353.  GE stock was up 1% in early trading on Thursday at $378.80.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on GE Aerospace, Raises Price Target to $455
summary: Jefferies  analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu   maintains GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) with a Buy and raises the price target from $365 to $455.

raw.headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on GE Aerospace, Raises Price Target to $455
raw.summary: Jefferies  analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu   maintains GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) with a Buy and raises the price target from $365 to $455.

headline: Is GE’s Tightened Governance And Dividend Policy Quietly Reframing The Investment Case For General Electric (GE)?
summary: On June 25, 2026, GE Aerospace’s board amended the company’s by-laws to tighten shareholder nomination procedures, clarify proxy card requirements, and set New York and federal courts as exclusive forums for key corporate and securities disputes, while also declaring a US$0.47 per-share dividend payable on July 27, 2026. These governance and capital-return moves arrive as GE Aerospace highlights its GE9X engine and expands partnerships such as its silicon carbide agreement with Wolfspeed,...
